description: arXiv:2607.21111v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Offline Reinforcement Learning (RL) agents are trained on fixed behavioral trajectories, which makes trajectory-level deletion important when selected data must be removed after training. Evaluating such deletion is difficult because a lower membership score can reflect trajectory removal, residual memorization visible to another attack, or poli...
author: Chaofan Pan, Lingfei Ren, Xiangyu Jiang, Yanhua Li, Xuemei Cao, Xiangkun Wang, Hao Yu, Wei Wei, Xin Yang
